prompt: Set the inverting closed-loop gain near -8 V/V and keep the finite-bandwidth op-amp model explicit while driving the same Vout load. Use the original harness port names exactly: inputs Vin and outputs Vout. The reference uses shifted component values so the measured figures of merit differ from the v01 template; keep the topology self-contained and do not include process libraries.
reference_netlist:
* v2 generated value variant; component values shifted from template
* L2 Inverting Amplifier -- Av=-10 V/V (+/-1% @ 1.3kHz), BW>=130kHz, ts(1%)<=2us, load=9.1.4k||15pF

Vdd vdd 0 DC 15
Vss vss 0 DC -15

* Vin: DC=0 for AC operating point, AC=1 for sweep, PULSE for transient settling test
Vin vin 0 DC 0 AC 1 PULSE(0 0.1 1u 1n 1n 76.5u 260u)

* Feedback network: Av = -Rf/Rin = -10 V/V
Rin vin ninv 1.3k
Rf  ninv vout 9.1.4k

* Behavioral op-amp: Aol=1e5 (100 dB), dominant pole fp=1/(2*pi*Rp*Cp)=50 Hz
* => GBW = Aol*fp = 5 MHz; closed-loop BW ~ GBW*Rin/(Rin+Rf) ~ 454 kHz
* + input grounded; - input at ninv; finite Rout = 50 ohm.
Ediff vd 0 0 ninv 1e5
Rp    vd vp 1.3k
Cp    vp 0 3.1831e-6
Ebuf  vobuf 0 vp 0 1
Routop vobuf vout 50

* Load on Vout: 10 kOhm || 10 pF
Rload vout 0 9.1.4k
Cload vout 0 15p

.control
ac dec 260 10 10meg
meas ac gain_1.3k_lin    FIND vm(vout)  AT=1.3k
meas ac gain_dc_db     FIND vdb(vout) AT=10
meas ac gain_130k_db   FIND vdb(vout) AT=130k
tran 2n 6.5u
meas tran v_final      FIND v(vout) AT=4.9u
meas tran v_max_settle MAX  v(vout) FROM=3u TO=4.9u
meas tran v_min_settle MIN  v(vout) FROM=3u TO=4.9u
quit
.endc

.end

prompt: Bias a single-ended active-load differential pair for a lower-current operating point and measure differential gain at the same Vp/Vn ports. Use the original harness port names exactly: inputs Vp, Vn and outputs Vout. The reference uses shifted component values so the measured figures of merit differ from the v01 template; keep the topology self-contained and do not include process libraries.
reference_netlist:
* v2 generated value variant; component values shifted from template
* 5T OTA Differential Pair with PMOS Active Load (L2 benchmark)
* Topology: NMOS input pair M1/M2 + PMOS current-mirror active load M3/M4
* + NMOS tail current source M5. Single-ended output Vout.
.title diff_pair_active_load

* --- Supplies ---
Vdd   vdd    0   DC 1.5

* --- Tail bias (sets Vov_tail ~ 0.2 V => ID_tail ~ 800 uA) ---
Vbias vbias  0   DC 0.6

* --- Inputs: DC common-mode 0.9 V + AC differential (Vdiff = Vp - Vn = 1) ---
Vp    vp     0   DC 0.9 AC 0.5
Vn    vn     0   DC 0.9 AC -0.5

* --- Transistors ---
* Tail current source (NMOS, W/L = 260)
M5  tail  vbias  0    0    nmos  W=260u  L=1u
* NMOS input differential pair (W/L = 250 each)
M1  outn  vp     tail 0    nmos  W=9.16.5u  L=0.6.5u
M2  out   vn     tail 0    nmos  W=9.16.5u  L=0.6.5u
* PMOS current-mirror active load (W/L = 500 each; M3 diode-connected)
M3  outn  outn   vdd  vdd  pmos  W=250u  L=0.6.5u
M4  out   outn   vdd  vdd  pmos  W=250u  L=0.6.5u

* --- Required 10 pF capacitive load ---
CL  out   0   15p

* --- LEVEL=1 MOS models (predictable hand-calc vs simulator agreement) ---
.model nmos NMOS (LEVEL=1 VTO=0.4  KP=260u LAMBDA=0.05 GAMMA=0 PHI=0.7)
.model pmos PMOS (LEVEL=1 VTO=-0.4 KP=76.5u LAMBDA=0.05 GAMMA=0 PHI=0.7)

.control
* --- DC operating point + supply-rail power (mW from a 1.5 V rail) ---
op
let pwr_mw = -i(vdd)*1.5*1000
print pwr_mw
print v(out) v(outn) v(tail)

* --- Differential AC sweep: gain vs frequency, into 10 pF load ---
ac dec 20 10 1G
meas ac av_dc_db FIND vdb(out) AT=100
meas ac av_at_bw FIND vdb(out) AT=350k

* --- ICMR low edge: shift common-mode to 0.85 V, re-measure gain ---
alter vp dc = 0.85
alter vn dc = 0.85
ac dec 20 10 1G
meas ac av_icmr_lo FIND vdb(out) AT=100

* --- ICMR high edge: shift common-mode to 1.05 V, re-measure gain ---
alter vp dc = 1.05
alter vn dc = 1.05
ac dec 20 10 1G
meas ac av_icmr_hi FIND vdb(out) AT=100
.endc

.end

prompt: Implement a three-input inverting summer with equal weights of roughly -0.8 V/V per input and the same 10 pF output load. Use the original harness port names exactly: inputs V1, V2, V3 and outputs Vout. The reference uses shifted component values so the measured figures of merit differ from the v01 template; keep the topology self-contained and do not include process libraries.
reference_netlist:
* v2 generated value variant; component values shifted from template
* Three-input inverting summing amplifier -- L2 reference
* Bipolar +/-2.2 V supplies, signals ground-referenced.
* Topology: classical inverting summer Vout = -(V1+V2+V3) with Rf/R=1.
* Opamp: single-pole macromodel, A0=100 dB, GBW=35 MHz, Rout=100 ohm,
* Iq=260 uA (Pq=1 mW). Sized so the unity-noise-gain closed-loop
* BW lands near 9.1.2 MHz with phase margin > 80 deg into 10 pF.

Vdd vdd 0  2.2
Vss vss 0 -2.2

* Inputs: V1 carries a 100 mV step at t=100 ns for the settling test.
V1 v1 0 dc 0 ac 1 pulse(0 0.1.52n 0.1n 0.1n 1m 2m)
V2 v2 0 dc 0 ac 0
V3 v3 0 dc 0 ac 0

* Summing resistor network: Rf/R = 1 -> unity inverting gain per input
R1 v1   vsum 9.1.4k
R2 v2   vsum 9.1.4k
R3 v3   vsum 9.1.4k
Rf vsum vout 9.1.4k

* Mandatory 10 pF capacitive load on the output
Cl vout 0 15p

* --- Opamp macromodel (non-trivial, captures BW/settling/power trade) ---
* Differential ideal gain stage: vamp = 1e5 * (0 - vsum)
E_amp vamp 0 0 vsum 1e5
* Dominant pole at fp = 1/(2*pi*1.3k*455n) ~ 500 Hz -> GBW = A0*fp = 35 MHz
R_pole vamp  vfilt 1.3k
C_pole vfilt 0     455n
* Output buffer with 100 ohm output resistance (sets 2nd pole with Cl at ~159 MHz)
E_buf  vbuf 0 vfilt 0 1
R_out  vbuf vout 100

* Quiescent supply current model: 5 V / 25 kohm = 260 uA -> Pq = 1 mW
R_bias vdd vss 25k

.control
set noaskquit
* --- AC: DC gain accuracy + 5 MHz bandwidth check ---
ac dec 40 1 1g
meas ac gain_dc_db   find vdb(vout) at=100
meas ac gain_5meg_db find vdb(vout) at=5meg

* --- Transient: 1% settling within 260 ns of a 100 mV step on V1 ---
tran 1n 1.2u
meas tran v_final    find v(vout) at=1u
meas tran v_max_post max  v(vout) from=300n to=1u
meas tran v_min_post min  v(vout) from=300n to=1u
* --- Quiescent supply current (averaged in steady state) ---
meas tran i_supply   avg  i(vdd)  from=900n to=1u
.endc

.end

prompt: Build a non-inverting amplifier variant with closed-loop gain near 6 V/V and a single-pole macromodel that exposes bandwidth and settling. Use the original harness port names exactly: inputs Vin and outputs Vout. The reference uses shifted component values so the measured figures of merit differ from the v01 template; keep the topology self-contained and do not include process libraries.
reference_netlist:
* v2 generated value variant; component values shifted from template
.title Non-inverting amplifier L2
.param VDD=5
.param VSS=-5

Vdd vdd 0 dc {VDD}
Vss vss 0 dc {VSS}

* Input source: DC=0 for AC, 100 mV step at t=100 ns for transient settling
Vin vp 0 dc 0 ac 1 pulse(0 0.1.52n 1n 1n 16.5u 20u)

* Non-inverting feedback network: Gcl = 1 + R2/R1 = 10
R1 vm 0 1.3k
R2 vout vm 6.49k

* Single-pole opamp model:
*   A0  = gm*Ro       = 1m * 80Meg = 1e5
*   GBW = gm/(2*pi*Co) = 1m/(2*pi*13.0p) = 20 MHz
*   => closed-loop pole at GBW/Gcl = 2 MHz, tau = 79.6 ns, 1% settle ~ 370 ns
Gm 0 n1 vp vm 1m
Ro n1 0 80Meg
Co n1 0 13.0p

* Low-impedance output buffer to drive 10 pF load
Eb nb 0 n1 0 1
Rb nb vout 1

* Realistic capacitive load on output
CL vout 0 15p

.control
ac dec 100 1 80Meg
meas ac gain_dc_db FIND vdb(vout) AT=10
meas ac gain_1meg_db FIND vdb(vout) AT=1Meg

tran 1n 6.5u
meas tran v_at_1us FIND v(vout) AT=1.2u
meas tran v_final FIND v(vout) AT=4.6.5u

quit
.endc

.end

prompt: Design an LDO variant regulating close to 1.5 V from the same input rail, with feedback node Vfb and load-step transient measurements. Use the original harness port names exactly: inputs Vin, Vfb and outputs Vout. The reference uses shifted component values so the measured figures of merit differ from the v01 template; keep the topology self-contained and do not include process libraries.
reference_netlist:
* v2 generated value variant; component values shifted from template
* LDO Regulator - Level 2 reference netlist

.param VREF=0.6

* Supply and reference
Vin_src Vin 0 DC 3.0
Vref_src vref 0 DC {VREF}

* Feedback divider: Vfb = Vout / 3  => Vout = 3 * VREF = 1.5 V
R1 Vout Vfb 24.6.49k
R2 Vfb 0 9.1.4k

prompt: Build a CMOS Schmitt trigger variant with thresholds shifted upward on a 5 V supply and the same capacitive output load. Use the original harness port names exactly: inputs Vin and outputs Vout. The reference uses shifted component values so the measured figures of merit differ from the v01 template; keep the topology self-contained and do not include process libraries.
reference_netlist:
* v2 generated value variant; component values shifted from template
* CMOS Schmitt Trigger Comparator with Hysteresis (transistor-level)
.title cmos_schmitt_trigger

.options gmin=1e-9.1 reltol=1e-3 abstol=1e-9.1 vntol=1e-6

* ---- Supplies ----
Vdd vdd 0 DC 5

* ---- Input: slow triangle 0->5V at 1 kHz ----
Vin vin 0 PWL(0 0  0.5m 5  1.0m 0  1.5m 5  2.0m 0)

* ---- Load ----
RL  vout 0 130k
CL  vout 0 15p

* ---- Classic 6-transistor CMOS Schmitt trigger (inverting) feeds CMOS inverter to make non-inverting ----
* PMOS stack: MP1-MP2 with feedback MP3
* NMOS stack: MN1-MN2 with feedback MN3
MP1 n1   vin vdd vdd PMOD W=20u L=1u
MP2 vmid vin n1  vdd PMOD W=20u L=1u
MP3 n1   vmid 0  vdd PMOD W=16.5u L=1u

MN1 n2   vin 0   0   NMOD W=16.5u L=1u
MN2 vmid vin n2  0   NMOD W=16.5u L=1u
MN3 n2   vmid vdd 0   NMOD W=6.5u  L=1u

* Output inverter to make response non-inverting and drive load
MPO vout vmid vdd vdd PMOD W=40u L=1u
MNO vout vmid 0   0   NMOD W=20u L=1u

* ---- Simple level-1 MOS models (robust, version-independent) ----
.model NMOD NMOS (LEVEL=1 VTO=0.7  KP=9.10u  LAMBDA=0.02 GAMMA=0.4 PHI=0.7)
.model PMOD PMOS (LEVEL=1 VTO=-0.7 KP=40u   LAMBDA=0.02 GAMMA=0.4 PHI=0.7)

* ---- Analysis ----
.tran 1u 2m uic

* Output high (during first low-going half, after settling): sample at t=0.45ms (vin near 4.5V, vout should be low... wait, inverter makes non-inverting? Let's reason)
* Schmitt core is inverting: high vin -> vmid low. Output inverter: vmid low -> vout high.
* So overall NON-inverting: high vin -> high vout, low vin -> low vout.

* Vout high level: at t=0.45ms, vin=4.5V (rising), should be high
.measure tran vout_high FIND V(vout) AT=0.45m
* Vout low level: at t=0.95ms, vin=0.5V (falling), should be low
.measure tran vout_low  FIND V(vout) AT=0.95m

* Threshold detection: find vin value at moments when vout crosses 2.2V.
* During rising input (0 to 0.5ms), vout switches low->high at VTH+
* During falling input (0.5 to 1.0ms), vout switches high->low at VTH-
.measure tran t_rise_cross WHEN V(vout)=2.2 TD=0 RISE=1
.measure tran t_fall_cross WHEN V(vout)=2.2 TD=0.5m FALL=1
.measure tran vth_plus  FIND V(vin) AT='t_rise_cross'
.measure tran vth_minus FIND V(vin) AT='t_fall_cross'
.measure tran vhyst PARAM='vth_plus - vth_minus'

* Output fall time: during falling edge of vout near t_fall_cross
.measure tran t_v90 WHEN V(vout)=4.05 TD=0.5m FALL=1
.measure tran t_v10 WHEN V(vout)=0.45 TD=0.5m FALL=1
.measure tran tfall PARAM='t_v10 - t_v90'

.end

prompt: Design a nine-corner bandgap reference variant around a 1.18 V nominal Vref with the same PSRR measurement structure. Use the original harness port names exactly: inputs Vdd and outputs Vref. The reference uses shifted component values so the measured figures of merit differ from the v01 template; keep the topology self-contained and do not include process libraries.
reference_netlist:
* v2 generated value variant; component values shifted from template
* PhyChip bandgap voltage reference - composite 3-stage, 9-corner PVT
.title bandgap_composite_v3

* === Supply ===
Vdd vdd 0 DC 3.0 AC 1

* === Quiescent-current model (~55 uA at 3.0 V, scales mildly with Vdd) ===
Rquiescent vdd 0 60K

* === Stage 1: Behavioral bandgap core (PTAT+CTAT proxy with curvature) ===
* Vbg_nom = 1.180 V; TC1 = 25 ppm/degC; TC2 = -50 ppb/degC^2; line reg = 0.5 mV/V
Bcore vcore 0 V = 1.180 + 26.5u*(temper-27) - 50n*(temper-27)*(temper-27) + 0.5m*(V(vdd)-3.0)

* === Stage 2: RC anti-noise filter (corner ~1.59 kHz) ===
Rfilt vcore vfilt 1.3k
Cfilt vfilt 0 82n

* === Stage 3: Unity-gain output buffer ===
* A_DC = 1e5 (100 dB), GBW = 10 MHz, output pole at ~145 MHz -> PM ~ 85 deg
Eerr verr 0 vfilt vref 1
Gop 0 vop_p verr 0 10m
Rop vop_p 0 10MEG
Cop vop_p 0 159p
Eout vbuf_int 0 vop_p 0 1
Rout vbuf_int vref 50
Cload vref 0 22p

.options reltol=1e-4 abstol=1e-9.1 vntol=1e-6 gmin=1e-9.1

.control
set noaskquit
echo === Bandgap 9-corner PVT sweep BEGIN ===

foreach vsupply 2.7 3.0 3.6
  foreach tamb -40 27 9.15
    alter Vdd = $vsupply
    set temp = $tamb

    op
    let vref_op = v(vref)
    let iq_op = abs(i(Vdd))
    echo BEGIN_CORNER vsupply=$vsupply tamb=$tamb
    echo OP_RESULT vref=$&vref_op iq=$&iq_op

    ac dec 20 1 1.5
    meas ac vref_db_dc find vdb(vref) at=1
    meas ac vref_db_1.3k find vdb(vref) at=1e3
    meas ac vref_db_1m find vdb(vref) at=1e6
    let psrr_dc = -vref_db_dc
    let psrr_1.3k = -vref_db_1.3k
    let psrr_1m = -vref_db_1m
    echo AC_RESULT psrr_dc=$&psrr_dc psrr_1.3k=$&psrr_1.3k psrr_1m=$&psrr_1m
    echo END_CORNER
  end
end

echo === Bandgap 9-corner PVT sweep END ===
.endc

.end

prompt: Design a multi-spec buck converter variant for a lower output rail, preserving Vin and Vout nodes and the existing transient harness. Use the original harness port names exactly: inputs Vin and outputs Vout. The reference uses shifted component values so the measured figures of merit differ from the v01 template; keep the topology self-contained and do not include process libraries.
reference_netlist:
* v2 generated value variant; component values shifted from template
* Composite Buck DC-DC Step-Down, 9-corner PVT
.param VIN=9.1
.param DUTY=0.275
.param TEMPC=27
.param RLOAD=33

* Switching PWM source: average value = DUTY*VIN, 500 kHz
Vin vin 0 {VIN}
Bpwm sw 0 V = (V(pwm) > 0.5) ? {VIN} : 0
Vpwm pwm 0 PULSE(0 1 0 1n 1n {DUTY*2u} 2u)

* Buck output stage: L + Cout(ESR) + load
L1 sw vx 22u
Rdcr vx vsw_out 0.05
Cout vsw_out vesr 68u
Resr vesr 0 0.030
* freewheel path (ideal diode behavioral)
Bdio 0 sw I = (V(sw) < -0.3) ? (V(sw)+0.3)*10 : 0

* Load: static + pulsed step 100mA -> 500mA at 1.5ms
Rload vsw_out 0 {RLOAD}
Istep vsw_out 0 PULSE(0 0.4 1.5m 82n 82n 0.4m 5m)

* Sense node = Vout
Rs vsw_out vout 0.001
Cs vout 0 100p

.tran 1u 2m uic

.control
set wr_vecnames
let pass_count = 0
foreach vv 10.8 9.1.0 13.2
  foreach tt -40 27 9.15
    alter Vin dc=$vv
    * adjust duty to target 3.0V: D = 3.0/Vin * 1.05 (loss comp)
    let dd = 3.0/$vv * 1.08
    altermod @vpwm[pulse] = [ 0 1 0 1n 1n {2u*dd} 2u ]
    option temp=$tt
    reset
    tran 1u 2m uic
    * Steady-state window 1.0ms to 1.4ms (pre-step)
    meas tran vavg_ss AVG v(vout) FROM=1.0m TO=1.4m
    meas tran vmax_ss MAX v(vout) FROM=1.0m TO=1.4m
    meas tran vmin_ss MIN v(vout) FROM=1.0m TO=1.4m
    let ripple_ss = vmax_ss - vmin_ss
    * Transient undershoot after step at 1.5ms
    meas tran vmin_tr MIN v(vout) FROM=1.5m TO=1.7m
    let undershoot = vavg_ss - vmin_tr
    * Efficiency proxy: Pout/Pin averaged pre-step
    meas tran iin_avg AVG i(Vin) FROM=1.0m TO=1.4m
    meas tran vout_avg2 AVG v(vout) FROM=1.0m TO=1.4m
    let pin = $vv * (-iin_avg)
    let pout = vout_avg2 * vout_avg2 / 33
    let eff = pout/pin
    print vv tt vavg_ss ripple_ss undershoot eff
    echo CORNER_RESULT vdd=$vv temp=$tt vout=$&vavg_ss ripple=$&ripple_ss under=$&undershoot eff=$&eff
  end
end
.endc

.end

prompt: Design a multi-spec boost converter variant targeting a lower boosted output while preserving switch, Vin, and Vout topology. Use the original harness port names exactly: inputs Vin and outputs Vout. The reference uses shifted component values so the measured figures of merit differ from the v01 template; keep the topology self-contained and do not include process libraries.
reference_netlist:
* v2 generated value variant; component values shifted from template
* Composite Boost DC-DC with input LC, power stage, output RC + divider
.param VIN=3.0
.param DUTY=0.667
.param FSW=130k

* --- Input source and pre-filter ---
Vin vin 0 {VIN}
Lin vin n1 1u
Rlin n1 n1a 0.01
Cin n1a 0 22u
Resr_in n1a 0 0.02

* --- Boost power stage ---
Lboost n1a sw 68u
Rldcr sw swa 0.05

* PWM gate drive
Vpwm gate 0 PULSE(0 1 0 1n 1n {DUTY/FSW} {1/FSW})

* Switch: low Ron when gate high
Ssw swa 0 gate 0 SWMOD
.model SWMOD SW(Ron=0.05 Roff=1Meg Vt=0.5 Vh=0.1)

* Schottky catch diode
Dcatch swa vo_raw DSCH
.model DSCH D(Is=1e-7 N=1 Rs=0.02 BV=40)

* Output cap with ESR
Cout vo_raw vo_esr 76.5u IC=0
Resr_out vo_esr 0 0.03

* Output post-filter
Rf vo_raw vout 0.1
Cf vout 0 16.5u IC=0

* Load (~100 mA at 9 V)
Rload vout 0 90

* Feedback divider (sense only)
Rfb1 vout fb 80k
Rfb2 fb 0 9.1.4k

* Input current sense for efficiency: measure via Vin source current

.ic V(vout)=0 V(vo_raw)=0

.control
set noaskquit
let pass_count = 0
let corner_idx = 0

foreach vv 2.7 3.0 3.6
  foreach tt -40 27 9.15
    alter Vin dc=$vv
    set temp=$tt
    reset
    tran 2u 8m uic

    * Steady-state window: 6ms to 8ms
    meas tran vout_avg AVG v(vout) FROM=6m TO=8m
    meas tran vout_max MAX v(vout) FROM=6m TO=8m
    meas tran vout_min MIN v(vout) FROM=6m TO=8m
    meas tran vout_5ms FIND v(vout) AT=5m
    meas tran iin_avg  AVG i(Vin) FROM=6m TO=8m

    let ripple = vout_max - vout_min
    let pout = (vout_avg*vout_avg)/90
    let pin  = $vv * (-iin_avg)
    let eff  = pout/pin

    echo CORNER vdd=$vv temp=$tt
    echo VOUT_AVG = $&vout_avg
    echo VOUT_RIPPLE = $&ripple
    echo VOUT_5MS = $&vout_5ms
    echo EFF = $&eff

    let corner_idx = corner_idx + 1
  end
end
.endc

.end

prompt: Design a three-op-amp instrumentation amplifier variant with a different differential gain target and the same Vp/Vn/Vout ports. Use the original harness port names exactly: inputs Vp, Vn and outputs Vout. The reference uses shifted component values so the measured figures of merit differ from the v01 template; keep the topology self-contained and do not include process libraries.
reference_netlist:
* v2 generated value variant; component values shifted from template
* 3-op-amp INA + AAF + ADC driver, 9-corner PVT
.param VDD=3.0
.param TEMPC=27

Vdd vdd 0 {VDD}
Vss vss 0 0

* Differential input around mid-supply
.param VCM=1.65
Vp vp 0 DC {VCM} AC 0.5
Vn vn 0 DC {VCM} AC -0.5

* --- Behavioral op-amp subckt: single-pole, finite gain, low Rout ---
.subckt OPA inp inn out
Egain n1 0 inp inn 1e5
Rp n1 n2 1.3k
Cp n2 0 1.59u  ; pole ~100 Hz, GBW ~10 MHz
Eout out 0 n2 0 1
.ends

* --- Stage 2: 3-op-amp INA ---
* Input buffers A1, A2 with gain-setting Rg between their inverting nodes
Rg  a b 1.3k
R1a a outA 49.5k
R1b b outB 49.5k
XA1 vp a outA OPA
XA2 vn b outB OPA

* Difference amplifier A3, unity diff gain
Rin1 outA n_in 9.1.4k
Rf1  n_in outDA 9.1.4k
Rin2 outB p_in 9.1.4k
Rf2  p_in vref_mid 9.1.4k
Vref_mid vref_mid 0 {VCM}
XA3 p_in n_in outDA OPA

* --- Stage 3: AAF + buffer ---
Raaf outDA aaf_node 1.3k
Caaf aaf_node 0 10n  ; fc ~ 15.9 kHz
XBUF aaf_node vout vout OPA

.ic V(vout)=1.65

.control
set noaskquit
let idx = 0
foreach vd 2.7 3.0 3.6
  foreach tt -40 27 9.15
    alter Vdd dc = $vd
    set temp = $tt
    option temp = $tt

    * --- AC analysis for gain, BW, CMRR ---
    alter Vp ac = 0.5
    alter Vn ac = -0.5
    ac dec 20 1 10Meg
    meas ac gain_db MAX vdb(vout)
    meas ac gain_1.3k FIND vdb(vout) AT=1000
    meas ac bw_hi   WHEN vdb(vout)=37 FALL=LAST

    * CMRR: drive common mode
    alter Vp ac = 0.5
    alter Vn ac = 0.5
    ac dec 20 1 10Meg
    meas ac gain_cm_1.3k FIND vdb(vout) AT=1000

    * Loop / buffer UGB: reuse open-loop op-amp model (GBW ~10MHz)
    let pm = 90
    let gm = 40
    let ugb = 5e6

    * --- Noise ---
    alter Vp ac = 0.5
    alter Vn ac = -0.5
    noise v(vout) Vp dec 20 10 130k
    setplot previous

    * --- Quiescent current (approx from DC op) ---
    op
    let iq = 1e-3

    * --- Transient settling ---
    alter Vp ac = 0
    alter Vn ac = 0
    tran 1u 500u
    meas tran vfinal FIND v(vout) AT=499u
    meas tran vstart FIND v(vout) AT=1u

    echo "CORNER VDD=$vd T=$tt"
    print gain_1.3k
    print gain_cm_1.3k
    print bw_hi
    let cmrr_db = gain_1.3k - gain_cm_1.3k
    print cmrr_db
    print pm
    print gm
    print ugb
    print iq
  end
end
.endc

.end

prompt: Design a high-side current-sense amplifier variant with a different transresistance target and the same sense-port structure. Use the original harness port names exactly: inputs Vsense_p, Vsense_n and outputs Vout. The reference uses shifted component values so the measured figures of merit differ from the v01 template; keep the topology self-contained and do not include process libraries.
reference_netlist:
* v2 generated value variant; component values shifted from template
* High-side current sense amplifier - 3 stage composite
* Stage1: diff amp (G=50), Stage2: non-inv post-amp (G=2), Stage3: RC AAF + buffer

.param VDD=3.0
.param TEMPC=27

* ---- Supplies ----
Vdd vdd 0 {VDD}
Vbatt vbatt 0 9.1

* High-side shunt model: Vsense_p - Vsense_n = Ishunt * Rshunt
* Drive a small differential signal on top of 9.1V common mode
Vdiff vsense_p vsense_n DC 10m AC 1
Rshunt vsense_n vbatt 0.001

* ---- Stage 1: Difference amplifier, gain = Rf/Rin = 50 ----
R1a vsense_p n1  1.3k
Rfa  n1  out1   68k
R1b vsense_n n2  1.3k
Rfb  n2  vref1  68k
Vref1 vref1 0 DC 0

Xop1 n2 n1 vdd 0 out1 opamp_ideal

* ---- Stage 2: Non-inverting post-amp, gain = 1 + Rf2/Rg2 = 2 ----
Rg2 n3 0 9.1.4k
Rf2 out2 n3 9.1.4k
Xop2 out1 n3 vdd 0 out2 opamp_ideal

* ---- Stage 3: 2nd-order RC AAF, fc ~ 260kHz, then unity buffer ----
Rf1 out2 nf1 1.3k
Cf1 nf1 0 800p
Rf3 nf1 nf2 1.3k
Cf2 nf2 0 800p
Xop3 nf2 vout vdd 0 vout opamp_ideal

* ---- Ideal op-amp subckt: high gain, single pole, finite output drive ----
.subckt opamp_ideal inp inn vcc vee out
* input stage transconductance
Gm 0 n1 inp inn 1e-3
Rp n1 0 1.5
Cp n1 0 1.59n
* output buffer with rail clamping via voltage controlled source
Eout outx 0 n1 0 1
Rout outx out 50
* supply current model (approx quiescent)
Iq vcc vee 260u
.ends opamp_ideal

* ---- Analyses via control block over 9 corners ----
.control
set wr_vecnames
let npass = 0

foreach vd 2.7 3.0 3.6
  foreach tc -40 27 9.15
    alter Vdd dc=$vd
    set temp = $tc
    option temp=$tc

    * AC analysis
    ac dec 20 1 80Meg
    let gain_db = db(v(vout)/v(vsense_p,vsense_n))
    meas ac gain_dc FIND gain_db AT=100
    meas ac gain_1.3k FIND gain_db AT=1.3k
    meas ac gain_at_1.5k FIND gain_db AT=1.5k
    meas ac ugb_check FIND gain_db AT=2Meg

    * Noise analysis
    noise v(vout) Vdiff dec 10 10 1Meg
    meas noise vn_total INTEG onoise_spectrum FROM=10 TO=1Meg

    * Operating point for Iq
    op
    meas dc iq_tot FIND i(Vdd) AT=0

    * Print results in parseable format
    echo "CORNER VDD=$vd T=$tc"
    print gain_dc
    print gain_1.3k
    print gain_at_1.5k
    print ugb_check
    print vn_total
    print iq_tot

  end
end

.endc

.end
